visuals.title: C Program Memory Layout
visuals.description: Visual diagram for C Program Memory Layout
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Memory Layout of C Program</text>
  
  <!-- High Addresses -->
  <text x="350" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    High Addresses
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Low Addresses -->
  <text x="70" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Low Addresses
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Kernel Space -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="320" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Kernel Space
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Stack -->
  <rect x="50" y="85" width="320" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Stack (grows downwards)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Heap -->
  <rect x="50" y="130" width="320" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Heap (grows upwards)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- BSS Segment -->
  <rect x="50" y="175" width="320" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    BSS Segment (Uninitialized Data)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Data Segment -->
  <rect x="50" y="210" width="320" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Segment (Initialized Data)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Text Segment -->
  <rect x="50" y="245" width="320" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Text Segment (Code)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow for stack growth -->
  <path d="M320 85 L320 125" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow for heap growth -->
  <path d="M100 170 L100 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow definitions -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Kernel Space
(Command Line Args
& Environment Vars)

Stack
(Grows Downwards)
- Local Variables
- Function Frames
